Oh, I killed my love in a jealous rage
 Then I broke out of the prisoner's cage
 But I lost my way in the dismal shades
 Of down in the Everglades

 Oh, oh, oh, oh

 I see her face in the mossy trees
 Defending sway in the tropic breeze
 'Cause I killed my love at her ghost parade
 Down in the Everglades

 Oh, oh, oh, oh

 Hear them bloodhounds bein'
 Lord, I know they're out to kill
 If those dogs gon' get me soon
 Some swamp critter will order the gator
 Watch me with a grin
 The quicksand threatens to pull me in
 And my blood runs cold as the sunlight fades
 Down in the Everglades

 Oh, oh, oh, oh
 Oh, oh, oh, oh
 Oh, oh, oh, oh
 Oh, oh, oh, oh
